steps.title: Spot the parallel measures
steps.content: Benjamin Franklin took two separate anti-counterfeiting steps—weaving threads and mineral into the paper, and stamping sage leaf imprints. The blank must connect these related measures aimed at the same defensive goal.

steps.title: Match the additive transition
steps.content: ”Moreover” signals that another anti-counterfeiting measure follows, showing Franklin employed multiple defensive strategies. The other three either signal contrast, narrow without a general statement, or redundantly repeat exemplification. That matches choice D — D is correct.
